result:
All 30 tests pass. Here's what was added to `lib/minigit.rb`:

- **`status`** — prints staged files or `(none)`
- **`diff <c1> <c2>`** — compares file sets, reports Added/Removed/Modified
- **`checkout <hash>`** — restores working directory files from commit, updates HEAD, clears index
- **`reset <hash>`** — moves HEAD only, no working directory changes
- **`rm <file>`** — removes a file from the staging index
- **`show <hash>`** — prints commit metadata and files with two-space indent
